training_status: construction worker (active all day); lifts weights sometimes

benefits.description: Appetite suppression is real and awesome

side_effects.description: Severe nausea when trying to go from 3mg to 4mg; had to step back and titrate up more slowly. Also experienced nausea when eating too much.

protocol_notes: Started Aug 10 at 287lbs, 5'7", age 35. Titration: 1mg x2 weeks, 2mg x2 weeks, 3mg x2 weeks, attempted 4mg but severe nausea, dropped back to 3mg, then 3.5mg, then reached 4mg. Has been on 4mg for a while. Eats whatever but focuses on high protein with every meal or snack; tries to eat high fiber. Drinks 2 Celsius energy drinks and water daily; drinks alcohol socially. Plans to taper off around 190lbs then begin TRT.
